title: Chewy's Q1 2023 Earnings Beat Estimates, Active Customer Sales Increase Y/Y
text: Chewy posted earnings of 5 cents a share in Q1 2023, a strong beat compared with analyst estimates of a loss of 4 cents per share. The pet retailer saw $2.78 billion in sales, up 14.7% year over year. This Q1 beat was significant as it demonstrated the company's ability to scale profitably while maintaining strong revenue growth. The strong performance was driven by higher autoship penetration, improved customer retention, and disciplined cost management. Active customer sales increased year-over-year despite concerns about post-pandemic customer attrition. The results suggested that Chewy's customer base had stabilized and the company was beginning to benefit from operational leverage from its scale.
